title: Socomec DIRIS,D30,D50,D70 _ Modbus Register Map
description: Socomec DIRIS,D30,D50,D70 _ Modbus map and register map with sample Modbus registers, register addresses, and power meter overview for engineers. Works with Modbus Monitor XPF (import directly) and includes downloadable CSV access in-app. Common searches: Socomec DIRIS,D30,D50,D70 _ Modbus register list, Socomec DIRIS,D30,D50,D70 _ Modbus table.
typical_use: power monitoring, energy metering, and facility automation

preview_registers.signal: Inst Measurement Load 1 Ph N voltage V1 V
Inst Measurement Load 1 Current I1 A
Inst Measurement Load 1 Total active power W
Energy measurement Load 1 Total positive active energy ea Wh
Inst Measurement Load 1 Date of last instance s
Inst Measurement Load 1 Ph N voltage V2 V
Inst Measurement Load 1 Ph N voltage V3 V
Inst Measurement Load 1 Ph ph voltage U12 V
Inst Measurement Load 1 Ph ph voltage U23 V
Inst Measurement Load 1 Ph ph voltage U31 V

source_csvs: Socomec - DIRIS D30_DIGIWARE D40 D50 D70 - Power Meter.csv
